fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(
  ISPICKVAL(Opportunity.Funding_Type__c, "Subscription"),
  IF(
    OR(
      TEXT(Subscription_Billing_Commitment__c) = "",
      TEXT(Subscription_Billing_Plan__c) = "",
      ISBLANK(Subscription_Start_Date__c),
      ISBLANK(Subscription_Term_Months__c)
    ),
    1,
    0
  ),
  0
)
fields.label: Subscription Compliance Check
fields.name: Subscription_Compliance_Check__c
